creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
jib script currently creates IP addresses for VNET jails with private MAC addresses:
> # + P denotes the special nibble whose value, if one of
> #   2, 6, A, or E (but usually 2) denotes a privately

It should be either allow or by default use FreeBSD's default MAC address vendor prefix "589CFC" just like for bhyve VMs.
